title: Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed — Chapter 852
main_description: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 206 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
